name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝗱𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗼𝗻 𝗶𝘁 | "can you do that on my di-?" | in which Satoru is mesmerized by your new hobby in dancing.

ㅤ

Something along the lines of this was a suggestion a long LONG time ago 😭 Y'all know I love teasing my man 😜

moving on,

Pleaseeeeee, ignore this vent/rant. I'm just really frustrated and hurt and need to get it out somewhere 💀

I've had this one friend since...birth, practically. I've always considered her my best friend, like my ride or DIE, but over the past few years I've noticed some things and am starting to notice that I'm her backup friend.

I'm always paying for her, like every single time we go out to eat I pay for everything. Not only that, I'm the one always driving as well 😭 Over the course of us being legal to drive, she has offered to drive less than 5 times. I've always been happy to go above and beyond for people I care about, I used to wake up at 3-4am so I could go with her to HER JOB as a volunteer because she wanted someone to talk to. I was happy to drive her around and pay for her meals cause I love treating people, but it feels like a knife to gut to see absolutely no reciprocation. I thought that since she had gotten a job and full control of her financials she would at least offer to pay for some meals, but nothing.

I thought maybe she was still having some issues with her parents and money until she showed me clothes and items she bought for herself off of tiktok shop.

I feel so damn CHEATED, she also seems to have no respect for my space...she constantly leaves her drinks and empty food containers in my car. I also rarely get a thank you for any of this. Which didn't bother me too much until I was with her and one of her other friends and she made a huge deal out of her friend buying her coffee, she even posted about it on her story. I don't get why all my actions seem to get sweeped under the rug. I constantly feel like I'm last on the list. I texted her on September 6th and I still have yet to get a text back. Whenever we do text, she's really dry and doesn't engage all that much in the conversation. I could send a bunch of texts and a thousand voice notes and only get a text or two back many many hours later. It's all the more annoying because I always try my best to respond as fast as I can, and she can't be bothered to send a text even after 2 weeks???

What makes it all worse is that I can see her actively posting on social media. I've gotten notifications for her posting on her story like 10 times this past week, and she's been posting on her spam 🚶‍♀️ She's hanging out with other people every day and I can't even get a text back.

Like what the hell??? I feel more like an unpaid chauffeur than a friend at this point.

anyways,

Enjoy!

Love,

Mama Down
